recommended_actions: Compare WooCommerce order notes with the payment gateway.
Confirm capture versus authorization before changing order status.
Check webhooks and gateway logs.
draft_reply:
Hi,

I understand the issue with “Customer charged, order still Pending payment”. I would first verify the current state rather than assume the visible symptom is the root cause. I will avoid changing or repeating a financial action until the gateway record is verified.

Please share the order number, gateway transaction reference. I will use that information to narrow the issue and confirm the safest next step.

Best,
Eva

recommended_actions: Confirm the relevant WooCommerce email is enabled.
